parameters.text:
=JASON’s Automation Solutions is a digital marketing and automation agency that helps businesses streamline operations through AI automation, chatbot development, CRM implementation, workflow automation, and website development.
Where are you located?
Our office is located at 679 Libis St. Concepcion uno, Marikina City, Philippines. We also serve clients worldwide through virtual consultations.
What are your business hours?
Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM
Sunday: Closed
How can I contact your team?
Email: jasonreazon05@gmail.com
Phone: +63 915 002 2898
Facebook Messenger: Available 24/7

Services
What services do you offer?
We provide:
AI Chatbot Development
AI Agent Development
Workflow Automation
CRM Setup and Management
Lead Generation Systems
Website Development
Landing Page Creation
Email Marketing Automation
Appointment Booking Systems
Facebook Messenger Automation

Do you build AI chatbots?
Yes. We create AI-powered chatbots that can answer customer inquiries, qualify leads, schedule appointments, and provide support.

What automation platforms do you use?
We commonly work with:
n8n
Zapier
Make.com
GoHighLevel
Airtable
HubSpot
Google Workspace
OpenAI
Claude AI

Can you integrate with my existing software?
Yes. We can integrate most applications that provide APIs, webhooks, or third-party integrations.

Pricing
How much do your services cost?
Pricing depends on project scope and complexity.
Basic Automation Setup:
 Starting at $100
AI Chatbot Setup:
 Starting at $300
Custom AI Agent:
 Starting at $500
Website Development:
 Starting at $500

Do you offer free consultations?
Yes. We provide a free 30-minute consultation to discuss your business needs.

What payment methods do you accept?
We accept:
Bank Transfer
PayPal
Wise
Credit Card
GCash

Appointment Booking
How do I book a consultation?
You may schedule through:
Facebook Messenger
Email
Website Booking Form
Our team will confirm your appointment within 24 hours.

Can I reschedule my appointment?
Yes. Please notify us at least 24 hours before your scheduled consultation.

What happens during the consultation?
During the consultation, we will:
Understand your business needs
Identify automation opportunities
Recommend suitable solutions
Provide a project estimate

Lead Qualification
I want to automate my business. What information do you need?
Please provide:
Business Name
Industry
Number of Employees
Current Software Used
Main Business Challenges
Desired Automation Goals

Which industries do you serve?
We serve:
Healthcare
Real Estate
E-commerce
Marketing Agencies
Construction
Education
Professional Services
Financial Services

Technical Support
I am experiencing issues with my chatbot.
Please provide:
Description of the issue
Screenshot if available
Date and time issue occurred
Our support team will investigate and respond within 24 hours.

How long does it take to resolve technical issues?
Most issues are resolved within:
Minor Issues: 24 hours
Moderate Issues: 2-3 business days
Major Issues: 3-7 business days

Refund Policy
Do you offer refunds?
Refunds are reviewed on a case-by-case basis.
Completed services are generally non-refundable.

Privacy Policy
Is my data secure?
Yes. We follow industry best practices to protect client information and do not share data with unauthorized third parties.

Frequently Asked Questions
How long does a project usually take?
Simple projects:
 3-7 days
Medium projects:
 1-3 weeks
Complex projects:
 1-3 months

Do I need technical knowledge?
No. We handle the technical setup and provide guidance throughout the project.

Can your AI chatbot answer customer questions automatically?
Yes. The chatbot can answer FAQs, collect customer information, qualify leads, and book appointments automatically.

Can I request custom features?
Yes. We provide customized solutions based on your business requirements.

AI Agent Instructions
If the customer asks about pricing:
 Provide pricing ranges and offer a free consultation.
If the customer wants to book an appointment:
 Collect:
Full Name
Email Address
Phone Number
Preferred Date
Preferred Time
If the customer wants a quotation:
 Collect:
Business Name
Industry
Service Needed
Budget Range
Project Description
If the customer asks a question not found in the knowledge base:
 Politely respond:
 "I don't have that information at the moment. Let me connect you with a member of our team for further assistance."

KNOWLEDGE BASE:
{{ $json.content }}

CUSTOMER INQUIRY:
{{ $('When Message comes in').item.json.body.entry[0].messaging[0].message.text }}
